UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2020 NOTICE OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT HILARIO CHICO, ET AL. - CONTINUED TO OCT-15-2020 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514 FOR FURTHER DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING. RON U. LUNSKI, ESQ. APPEARED VIA COURTCALL WITH PLAINTIFF SUSAN VALDETANO CHICO, WHO ALSO APPEARED VIA COURTCALL. DEFENDANTS HILARIO AND MARIBEL GRANDE WERE PRESENT IN PRO PER, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER ASSISTED MR. CHICO AND MS. GRANDE DURING THIS MORNING'S PROCEEDINGS. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANTS' FOR A CONTINUANCE IN ORDER TO FILE A MOTION TO SET-ASIDE THE DEFAULTS ENTERED 3/11/20. DEFENDANTS ARE INFORMED THAT THEIR MOTION TO SET-ASIDE THE DEFAULTS MUST BE FILED AND SET FOR HEARING PRIOR TO THE NEXT CALLING OF THIS CASE IN D514. NO FURTHER SERVICE REQUIRED. THE PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE OF THE 10/15/20 HEARING DATE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY GISELLE CASEY, CSR #8098. TELEPHONE: 415-551-3680. EMAIL: GCASEY@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: GISELLE CASEY. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Plaintiffs Request For Default Judgment Against Defendant Hilario Chico
Off Calendar Oct-15-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Hilario Chico and Maribel Grande.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Ron U. Lunski, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Susana Valdetano Chico, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Hilario Chico and Maribel Grande.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Written of Contract, Oral Contract and Common Counts was filed on November 6, 2019, and personally served on defendant Maribel Grande on November 12, 2019.
Substitute Service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents occurred on January 14, 2020 and was effectuated on January 24, 2020.
Default as to both defendants was entered on March 11, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on March 18, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Susana Valdetano Chico, and against the defaulted defendants Hilario Chico and Maribel Grande, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $68,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $88,800.00.
Costs - $1,125.00.

Total - $157,925.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2020 Continued To Nov-25-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Plaintiffs Request For Default Judgment Against Defendant Hilario Chico
Off Calendar Jul-16-2020 Continued To Oct-15-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2020 Continued To Aug-12-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
